data.description: IRAN'S DEPUTY DEFENCE MINISTER TALAEI-NIK SAYS TEHRAN IS READY TO SHARE ITS DEFENSIVE WEAPONS CAPABILITIES WITH MEMBERS OF SHANGHAI COOPERATION ORGANISATION - STATE MEDIA

data.title: 3Shape Receives FDA 510(k) Clearance for 3Shape Dx Software
data.description: Denmark-based company 3Shape disclosed today that their Dx Software has received FDA clearance after a recent review on April 10, 2026. The approval was granted through the 510(k) Premarket Notification process, allowing the Dx (R1) software to be marketed in the US.
Annual General Meeting presentation details the company's performance: revenue up by 15% to $1.5 billion; net profit increased by 20% to $200 million.

data.title: CoStar Data Shows London Southern Fringe Office Leasing Reached Nine-Year High
data.description: In 2025, heightened activity from smaller tenants in London's Southern Fringe area led to the highest leasing volumes since 2016, as per figures from CoStar. The leasing activities surged to just under 1 million sq. ft., with a significant pre-let of approximately 500,000 sq. ft. at Battersea Power Station. Historically, leasing numbers in this region were predominantly impacted by a limited number of larger tenants.

data.title: Roquette Showcases Its Expanded Consumer Healthcare Capabilities at Vitafoods Europe 2026
data.description: Roquette, a company based in Lille, France, will be presenting its enhanced consumer healthcare offerings at Vitafoods Europe 2026. The focus will be on showcasing their wide-ranging portfolio of products and services.

data.title: Phillips 66 Limited completes acquisition of Lindsey Oil Refinery assets
data.description: Phillips 66 Limited has completed the acquisition of assets and infrastructure from Prax Lindsey Oil Refinery Limited in London. The acquisition will see Phillips 66 taking over key facilities and equipment. This strategic move is expected to significantly boost Phillips 66's operations in the region. Key details and financial figures regarding the deal have not been disclosed publicly.

data.title: Budweiser Partners with Football Icons Erling Haaland and Jürgen Klopp to Unleash New “Let it Pour” Platform for FIFA World Cup 2026™
data.description: In London today, Budweiser, the Official Beer Sponsor of the FIFA World Cup 2026™, launched its latest global football platform, "Let It Pour," setting the stage for the highly anticipated event. This activation will take place in over 40 countries, offering Bud FC fan events, The Bud Fan Store, and a new global film that aims to unite the world in celebrating the sport. Budweiser has been a part of this tradition for over four decades, and with this initiative, they are gearing up to make an impact on a global scale.

data.title: New Georgetown Report: California Could Deliver $214,000 Per Working Adult by Helping More Earn Degrees, Credentials of Value and Good-Paying Jobs
data.description: In Oakland, California, a recent report by the Georgetown University Center on Education and the Workforce and College Futures Foundation suggests that the state has the potential to generate $4.4 trillion in economic gains over the next 50 years. This amount equates to $214,000 per working-age adult. The key to unlocking this economic growth lies in raising the attainment of valuable postsecondary credentials, degrees, and certificates to 70% across all demographic groups. The report titled "The Golden Ticket" outlines the significant impact that achieving this goal could have on California's economy.

data.title: Introducing the Logitech G512 X Gaming Keyboard: Designed to be Tuned, Tweaked, and Mastered for Personalized Performance
data.description: Logitech G has introduced the latest Logitech G512 X TMR Analog/Mechanical Gaming Keyboard - a cutting-edge keyboard catered to gamers who consider their setups as dynamic ecosystems. Unlike traditional static hardware, the G512 X is a modular and performance-centric system that can be customized and optimized for individual preferences. This innovative keyboard is the pioneer in adapting to the intricacies of each player's distinct gaming style, as opposed to the conventional method of gamers conforming to their equipment. This development marks a significant shift towards personalized gaming experiences.

data.title: Thredd Powers Clique’s Launch of an Invite-Only Wealth Ecosystem with Visa Card Program
data.description: Singapore-based issuer processing platform Thredd has revealed a collaboration with Clique Finance Limited, a private wealth management ecosystem catering to entrepreneurs, family offices, and high-net-worth individuals with intricate international lifestyles. The partnership aims to provide a contemporary financial experience for individuals interested in managing their wealth across digital assets and daily expenses. Clique Finance Limited is an invite-only platform designed for those seeking wealth management solutions outside conventional banking systems.

data.title: Castle Leisure Limited extends long‑term relationship with NCR Atleos to ensure reliable, free‑to‑use cash access across UK venues
data.description: In Atlanta, NCR Atleos Corporation (NYSE: NATL), a prominent provider of self-service financial access solutions, revealed its extension of services with Castle Leisure Limited in the UK. Castle Leisure Limited, an operator of leisure and bingo venues, has decided to continue their partnership with NCR Atleos to offer customers free access to cash. The renewed agreement will see NCR Atleos supplying and overseeing 22 A...

data.title: Tilt Launches Industry-first AI Tool; Boosts Sales by Nearly 50%
data.description: London-based company Tilt has introduced Snap, an innovative AI feature on their live auction app for fashion and collectibles. Snap automatically generates product listings from live video in less than a second. During initial trials, Snap has led to a remarkable 47% rise in sales by optimizing listings intelligently. This launch aims to address a major challenge in live commerce, as studies reveal that sellers on online marketplaces waste around 16 hours weekly on manual administrative tasks.

data.title: Albion and Tecnotree Partner to Deliver Next-Generation VAS Platform for TELUS in North America
data.description: Albion, a prominent telecom managed services provider, revealed that TELUS has opted for them, in collaboration with Tecnotree, to introduce a cutting-edge Value-Added Services (VAS) platform. The platform's first phase will involve launching a voicemail application. Albion will spearhead the project by utilizing Tecnotree’s established VAS and digital services platform. This move aligns with TELUS’ goals of upgrading service offerings and enriching their customer experience.

data.title: Smartcat Unveils AI-Powered Course Creation and Translation Workflows for Real-Time Market Adaptation at Learning Technologies London 2026
data.description: Today in London, Smartcat, a top enterprise AI platform for global content, introduced advanced Multi-Agent Systems for developing courses. These systems empower L&D teams to efficiently scale and modify global learning content as markets evolve. The new technology aims to enhance the adaptability and growth of enterprise learning programs. The announcement took place on April 28, 2026.

data.title: Bastion Fiduciary to Detail Financial Transparency in Segment for All Access hosted by Andy Garcia
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Los Angeles, a new segment on the Public Television show All Access, hosted by Andy Garcia, will showcase the advancements in investor protections and fee transparency. The segment will feature Bastion Fiduciary and is scheduled to be filmed in 2026. This documentary will provide insights into the changes in the financial sector, emphasizing the importance of safeguarding investors and disclosing fees.

data.title: Clarivate Introduces Nexus Connect, the First Institutional AI Gateway to Trusted Research and Learning
data.description: Nexus Connect recently introduced an AI chat agent integration for universities, offering a branded connector for easy access to academic resources and services. London, on April 28, 2026 - Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT), a prominent global provider, announced this innovative feature.
